verses.latin_vulgate: Deus, quis similis erit tibi ?  ne taceas, neque compescaris, Deus :
verses.king_james: Keep not thou silence, O God: hold not thy peace, and be not still, O God.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam ecce inimici tui sonuerunt,  et qui oderunt te extulerunt caput.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־הִנֵּ֣ה א֭וֹיְבֶיךָ יֶהֱמָי֑וּן וּ֝מְשַׂנְאֶ֗יךָ נָ֣שְׂאוּ רֹֽאשׁ׃
verses.king_james: For, lo, thine enemies make a tumult: and they that hate thee have lifted up the head.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super populum tuum malignaverunt consilium,  et cogitaverunt adversus sanctos tuos.
verses.king_james: They have taken crafty counsel against thy people, and consulted against thy hidden ones.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixerunt : Venite, et disperdamus eos de gente,  et non memoretur nomen Israël ultra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָמְר֗וּ לְ֭כוּ וְנַכְחִידֵ֣ם מִגּ֑וֹי וְלֹֽא־יִזָּכֵ֖ר שֵֽׁם־יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל עֽוֹד׃
verses.king_james: They have said, Come, and let us cut them off from being a nation; that the name of Israel may be no more in remembrance.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam cogitaverunt unanimiter ;  simul adversum te testamentum disposuerunt :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י נוֹעֲצ֣וּ לֵ֣ב יַחְדָּ֑ו עָ֝לֶ֗יךָ בְּרִ֣ית יִכְרֹֽתוּ׃
verses.king_james: For they have consulted together with one consent: they are confederate against thee:

verses.latin_vulgate: tabernacula Idumæorum et Ismahelitæ,  Moab et Agareni,
verses.king_james: The tabernacles of Edom, and the Ishmaelites; of Moab, and the Hagarenes;

verses.latin_vulgate: Gebal, et Ammon, et Amalec ;  alienigenæ cum habitantibus Tyrum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גְּבָ֣ל וְ֭עַמּוֹן וַעֲמָלֵ֑ק פְּ֝לֶ֗שֶׁת עִם־יֹ֥שְׁבֵי צֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: Gebal, and Ammon, and Amalek; the Philistines with the inhabitants of Tyre;

verses.latin_vulgate: Etenim Assur venit cum illis :  facti sunt in adjutorium filiis Lot.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־אַ֭שּׁוּר נִלְוָ֣ה עִמָּ֑ם הָ֤יֽוּ־זְר֖וֹעַ לִבְנֵי־ל֣וֹט סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: Assur also is joined with them: they have holpen the children of Lot. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fac illis sicut Madian et Sisaræ,  sicut Jabin in torrente Cisson.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֲשֵֽׂה־לָהֶ֥ם כְּמִדְיָ֑ן כְּֽסִיסְרָ֥א כְ֝יָבִ֗ין בְּנַ֣חַל קִישֽׁוֹן׃
verses.king_james: Do unto them as unto the Midianites; as to Sisera, as to Jabin, at the brook of Kison:

verses.latin_vulgate: Disperierunt in Endor ;  facti sunt ut stercus terræ.
verses.king_james: Which perished at En–dor: they became as dung for the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pone principes eorum sicut Oreb,  et Zeb, et Zebee, et Salmana :  omnes principes eorum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁיתֵ֣מוֹ נְ֭דִיבֵימוֹ כְּעֹרֵ֣ב וְכִזְאֵ֑ב וּֽכְזֶ֥בַח וּ֝כְצַלְמֻנָּ֗ע כׇּל־נְסִיכֵֽימוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Make their nobles like Oreb, and like Zeeb: yea, all their princes as Zebah, and as Zalmunna:

verses.latin_vulgate: qui dixerunt : Hæreditate possideamus sanctuarium Dei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֣ר אָ֭מְרוּ נִ֣ירְשָׁה לָּ֑נוּ אֵ֝֗ת נְא֣וֹת אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Who said, Let us take to ourselves the houses of God in possession.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus meus, pone illos ut rotam,  et sicut stipulam ante faciem venti.
verses.king_james: O my God, make them like a wheel; as the stubble before the wind.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sicut ignis qui comburit silvam,  et sicut flamma comburens montes,
verses.king_james: As the fire burneth a wood, and as the flame setteth the mountains on fire;

verses.latin_vulgate: ita persequeris illos in tempestate tua,  et in ira tua turbabis eos.
verses.king_james: So persecute them with thy tempest, and make them afraid with thy storm.

verses.latin_vulgate: Imple facies eorum ignominia,  et quærent nomen tuum, Domine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַלֵּ֣א פְנֵיהֶ֣ם קָל֑וֹן וִיבַקְשׁ֖וּ שִׁמְךָ֣ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Fill their faces with shame; that they may seek thy name, O Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erubescant, et conturbentur in sæculum sæculi,  et confundantur, et pereant.
verses.king_james: Let them be confounded and troubled for ever; yea, let them be put to shame, and perish:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et cognoscant quia nomen tibi Dominus :  tu solus Altissimus in omni terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽיֵדְע֗וּ כִּי־אַתָּ֬ה שִׁמְךָ֣ יְהֹוָ֣ה לְבַדֶּ֑ךָ עֶ֝לְי֗וֹן עַל־כׇּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: That men may know that thou, whose name alone is Jehovah, art the most high over all the earth.
